summary: Completed testing for Iteration 33 - Storefront Homepage Banners. Backend tests: 13/13 passed. Frontend: Both India and Pakistan store homepages display banners correctly with Shopify CDN images, navigation arrows, slide indicators, and working CTA buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/storefront/home-config endpoint correctly returns banners filtered by store_name
India store (tnvcollection) returns 3 banners: DESIGNER COLLECTION, FORMAL ELEGANCE, GENUINE LEATHER
Pakistan store (tnvcollectionpk) returns 3 banners: READY TO DISPATCH, DESIGNER SHOES, GENUINE LEATHER
All banner images use Shopify CDN URLs (cdn.shopify.com)
Frontend LuxuryStorefrontHome.jsx correctly fetches banners from API and displays them
HeroSection component has proper slideshow with auto-rotation (6 second interval)
Navigation arrows (ChevronLeft/ChevronRight) work correctly for manual slide navigation
Slide indicators at bottom allow direct slide selection
CTA buttons correctly link to collection pages with proper store prefix
Multi-tenant support working - India shows ₹ currency, Pakistan shows Rs currency
seed_data_creation: None - banners already seeded in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested Storefront Homepage Banners feature. Key endpoints: GET /api/storefront/home-config?store={store_name} returns banners and collections. Frontend component: LuxuryStorefrontHome.jsx with HeroSection for banner slideshow. Both India (tnvcollection) and Pakistan (tnvcollectionpk) stores have 3 banners each with Shopify CDN images. Navigation arrows and slide indicators work correctly. CTA buttons link to collection pages.

backend_api.GET /api/storefront/home-config?store=tn: PASS - Returns 3 banners with Shopify CDN images
PASS - Returns 3 banners with Shopify CDN images
backend_api.Banner structure validation: PASS - All required fields present (title, image, cta, link, is_active)

frontend_india_store.Banner title displays correctly: PASS - Shows DESIGNER COLLECTION, FORMAL ELEGANCE, GENUINE LEATHER

frontend_pakistan_store.Banner title displays correctly: PASS - Shows READY TO DISPATCH, DESIGNER SHOES, GENUINE LEATHER
